title: WorkForms - order of items in single or multiple selection
excerpt:
It’s really difficult to manage the order of items in single or multiple selection. We should have control over the order in which items appear. 
BTW, WorkForms is a great product! Thank you for your work!

posts.author: o42 (Francis Ménard)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s really difficult to manage the order of items in single or multiple selection. We should have control over the order in which items appear.

BTW, WorkForms is a great product! Thank you for your work!

posts.author: kallee (Kelly Allee)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree! I want my multiple choice answers to be in alpha order, but I can’t figure out how to reorder them.
